list.noSubscriptionsDescription: Create your first subscription to start offering fixed plans to your students.

messages.studentAlreadyHasSubscription: This student already has an active subscription with you

info.familyBilling: The subscription covers the guardian and all their dependents automatically.
info.billingDay: Billing is generated on the billing day configured for each student.
info.experimentalNotCounted: Trial classes are not counted towards the monthly limit.
info.softDelete: Subscriptions cannot be deleted, only deactivated.

confirm.deactivateDescription: When deactivated, assigned students will be automatically removed from this plan. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.removeStudentDescription: The student will be removed from this subscription. Future classes will be billed individually.

studentView.noSubscription: You don't have an active subscription at the moment

assign.title: Assign Students to Subscription
assign.noAvailableStudents: All students already have an active subscription
assign.startsAtHelp: From this date, classes will be counted towards the subscription
